race.name: Kalix Loppet
race.tagline: Thirty classic kilometers along the Bothnian coast — northern Sweden's riverside loppet where the Kalix River meets the frozen Gulf of Bothnia.

climate.description: Northern Sweden's Bothnian coast with reliable cold and snow. March temperatures typically -15°C to -3°C. The Gulf of Bothnia freezes over most winters.
challenges: Wind off the frozen Gulf of Bothnia
Short daylight hours in early March at 66°N

course.primary: Flat to gently rolling course along the Kalix River valley and Bothnian coast. Classic technique through birch forest and riverside terrain.
course.surface: Groomed classic tracks through riverside forest and open terrain
features: Near the Arctic Circle — northern character
Flat coastal terrain with river views

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: A small northern Swedish coastal loppet with excellent snow reliability. Flat terrain, small field, and remote Arctic location limit the overall score.

history.summary: Kalix Loppet is a regional classic-technique ski marathon held in the town of Kalix on Sweden's northern Bothnian coast, near the Arctic Circle. The Kalix River is one of Sweden's last undammed rivers.
notable_facts: Kalix lies near the Arctic Circle at 66°N latitude
The Kalix River is one of Sweden's four remaining undammed rivers
Gulf of Bothnia freezes over in most winters
Small but dedicated Norrbotten skiing community

videos.description: Hej! Lägret i Kalix rullar på och nu på morgonen körde vi ett snabbhetspass blandat med utförsträning! Följ våra elever och njut av lite fart i Kalix!

Alaska man backs into his shed as bull moose approaches
videos.description:
An Alaska man taking a sack of garbage to his shed on Saturday found himself briefly trapped by a bull moose. A home security camera captured Curtis Phelps trapped inside the shed with the moose outside.

Read more: https://apnews.com​

videos.title: Ribom De svenska längdskidåkarna favoriterna, blev världsmästare i teamsprinten i slutet av ett lopp
SkiX
videos.description:
Cross country skiing requires strength, endurance and technique. At SkiX we will provide the world with programs and exercises that will improve people’s skill set and health. 

“ Our e-learning platform will be a unique tool for inactive and active people, families and friends. It will encourage increased activity levels, joy and mastery at any level.”  Marit Bjørgen - Most decorated Winter Olympian in history.

“I love skiing and training. I think it is smart to have a look at how we trained and had fun as young athletes, and how we train today to minimize injuries.” Martin Johnsrud Sundby 

“Rollerskiing is the most fun form of training for all ages. At SkiX we will provide the world with programs and exercises that will improve people’s skill set and health.” Ragnar Bragvin Andresen

quotes.text: It's very loose out there in the tracks and a strong skier like Jonna, for example, may not really get all the strength she gets into the snow. And I think a skater like Ebba who skates in a different way and a different type of skater might have an advantage.

The course starts out quite easy at the beginning, but after just 500 m it starts to go uphill with 1.1 km where we have the first time placement up on the slalom hill here in Kalix. It continues to be very tough, with both tough downhill runs and difficult hills - a really tough course, tougher than the World Cup course in Trondheim, just in terms of the number of vertical meters and climbs.
